prompt: Running forge-execute in CI mode. Three journeys: 'login' PASS, 'checkout' FAIL (payment timeout), 'logout' FAIL (session not cleared). Should I attempt fixes or exit?
expected_output: In CI mode: exit code 1 (journeys FAIL). Does not auto-fix; requires human intervention. Captures evidence to e2e-evidence/forge-attempt-1/ for human review. Shows which journeys FAILed and why (payment timeout = HIGH root cause, session clear = MEDIUM). User decides if fixes are safe for CI or require manual review.
